# text / config

The **text** type's config capability: the `textField` factory (core) and the
single-line `<Input>` renderer contributed to `config-v2.fields.renderer` (web).

Relocated from `config_v2/plugins/fields/plugins/primitives`. The factory builds
a config_v2 `FieldDef<string>` carrying the canonical `fields/` text token
(`@plugins/fields/plugins/text/core`, id `"text"`); dispatch is by id string.
Shared `FieldHeader` / `useLocalValue` come from the slot owner
(`@plugins/config_v2/plugins/fields/web`).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Text field type: config-render capability (single-line input for config-v2.fields.renderer) plus the textField factory.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `config-v2.fields.renderer` "text" → `TextRenderer`
- Core:
  - Uses: `config_v2.FieldDef`, `config_v2.FieldMeta`, `config_v2.pickMeta`
  - Exports: Types: `TextFieldDef`; Values: `textField`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
